message: refactor(channels): route core through registered plugin capabilities

+            accountId: accountId ?? "",

+            boundAt: binding.boundAt,
+            lastActivityAt:

+                ? binding.metadata.idleTimeoutMs
+                : undefined,
+            maxAgeMs:

+                ? binding.metadata.maxAgeMs
+                : undefined,
+          })),
